commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f7bb1fa7c30ccf2dbe32da59f92aff85e2135901)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an optional model-fallback `beforeAttempt` hook, threads cron deadline access into isolated cron execution, skips fallback attempts when remaining cron budget is too small, and adds focused tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection confirms current main has no pre-attempt cron fallback veto, and the PR body includes production logs plus terminal output demonstrating the intended low-budget fallback skip; I did not run a live provider repro.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor/current-head real behavior proof before merge, so this should stay in normal maintainer review rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger

commands.review_summary:
The PR removes `message_reference` construction and spreading from the Discord webhook payload builder in `src/discord/send.outbound.ts`.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main builds `message_reference` in the active webhook sender when `replyTo` is set, and the outbound adapter can pass `replyToId` into that sender; no live Discord webhook send was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This external PR needs contributor action for real behavior proof and a branch update or replacement that touches the active plugin file before merge.

target.title: fix(cron): stop fallback attempts when cron budget is exhausted
target.author: imwyvern
